purpose: Keep SkillsManager-RunStates-Manager in the correct place inside the skill-governance chain.
instruction: Insert runstates after SkillsManager-Doc-Structure and before SkillsManager-Tooling-CheckUp.
Do not replace the host skill workflow orchestrator with this skill.
Treat runstates as one governance step inside skill creation and skill refit.
workflow: Select or scaffold the target skill shape first.
Only then continue into tooling audit.
rules: Runstates governs runtime method readiness, not the host skill business workflow itself.
Skills_runtime_checklist must stay in runstate schema, not in metadata.skill_profile.
